description:
stylize your text with cool fonts - emo, goth, bolt, gl1tch3d
FontStylr takes your text and makes it pretty! Type anything and customise your text with over 20+ fonts with more to come. You can then copy the text and use it in your Instragram bio, or Mastodon posts - to look edgier and kewler than your friend ;)

NO FILES TO DOWNLOAD! NO EXTERNAL FONTS TO INSTALL! Just type, choose your preferred character style and enjoy! :)
